name: BB:UBA : Application or Service Installed
notes: This BB detects events around application/service installed.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Application or Service Installed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event QID is one of the following (25000054) Instant Messaging Installed, (25000082) Antivirus Installed, (25000089) Applications Installed, (25000190) Peer-to-peer Installed, (25000196) Microsoft Applications Installed, (25000208) Windows Services Installed, (5000515) Failure Audit: A service was installed in the system, (5001613) A service was installed in a system
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Application or Service Installed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event QID is one of the following (25000054) Instant Messaging Installed, (25000082) Antivirus Installed, (25000089) Applications Installed, (25000190) Peer-to-peer Installed, (25000196) Microsoft Applications Installed, (25000208) Windows Services Installed, (5000515) Failure Audit: A service was installed in the system, (5001613) A service was installed in a system
